title: schellolepis tomentella
constituents: Schellolepis tomentella has many active constituents, such as alkaloids, glycosides, flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. These constituents include iridoid glycosides like aucubin and sweroside, and phenolic compounds like quercetin and kaempferol, which exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The medicinal constituents of Schellolepis tomentella have been found to improve daily lives by reducing inflammation and pain in people suffering from arthritis, promoting wound healing, and protecting against cardiovascular diseases, as well as exhibiting potential anticancer properties. By possessing such diverse medicinal properties, the constituents of Schellolepis tomentella make it a valuable plant for the development of new medicines and treatments.
